title: GAIA Review Skill — Phase 3A analysis-results.json
description: Structured artifact emitted by the deterministic Phase 3A of the six review skills (gaia-code-review and siblings) per ADR-075 / FR-DEJ-5. Top-level additionalProperties is intentionally true so future fields (e.g. timing per NFR-DEJ-1) can be added without bumping schema_version. schema_version bumps only on breaking changes.

schema_version.description: Schema version string. MUST be exactly '1.0' for this schema. Bumped only on breaking changes.

skill.description: Producing review skill name, e.g. gaia-code-review.

skill_version.description: Version of the producing review skill.

model.description: LLM model id pinned for the run (e.g. claude-opus-4-7 per ADR-074).

model_temperature.description: LLM temperature (MUST be 0 for review skills per FR-DEJ-8).

prompt_hash.description: sha256 of the prompt used in Phase 3B (recorded in report header per FR-DEJ-8).

tool_versions.description: Map of deterministic tool name to version (e.g. {"eslint":"9.x","tsc":"5.x"}). Feeds the cache key per FR-DEJ-11.

file_hashes.description: Map of file path (relative to project root) to sha256 hash. Feeds the cache key per FR-DEJ-11.

checks.description: Per-tool deterministic check results. Empty array is valid (default verdict: APPROVE).

scope.description: Scope of the check — typically 'file' or 'project'.

status.description: passed = no findings; failed = blocking finding(s); errored = tool crashed/unrecoverable; skipped = not applicable.

skip_reason.description: Required when status=skipped — short human-readable explanation.

error_reason.description: Required when status=errored — short human-readable explanation.

findings.description: Per-file/line findings. Empty array allowed when status=passed.
